title: Dishwasher with detergent dispenser
abstract: A dishwasher detergent dispenser having a set of restraints configured to retain a detergent tablet in a cavity of the detergent dispenser, and a water outlet configured to release water to a top section of the detergent dispenser.
claims: 1. A dishwasher, comprising: a washing compartment comprising a door attached thereto; a detergent dispenser mounted on the door; a water conduit fixed to a rack within the washing compartment and in fluid communication with a water outlet, and wherein the water conduit extends in a first direction, and the water outlet extends at a fixed angle relative to the first direction to be positioned above the detergent dispenser when the dishwasher is operating.
